title: ci: doccheck does build + install before validate-docs
body:
## Problem

The `doccheck` GHA job removes the pre-installed skopeo package, runs `make bin/skopeo` + `make install`, then `make validate-docs`.

## Review context

Sandbox GHA migration review (mtrmac, [PR #1 discussion](https://github.com/podman-container-tools/skopeo-sandbox/pull/1#discussion_r3181672805)), marked "not now":

> this should be possible to do with just `make validate-docs` without `make install` (and without removing `/usr/bin/skopeo`)

## Related

- Epic #2919
- `doccheck` job in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
